title: An infovore shares his chats - Marginal REVOLUTION
gist: A thin promotional link-post: Cowen, in conjunction with OpenAI, shares example GPT Pro chats for travel use cases like curating museum visits and reading local newspapers about a place.

insights.claim: Cowen uses GPT Pro to curate which works to seek out at a museum and to surface local newspaper context, and vouched for the museum advice after visiting the Detroit Institute of Arts.
insights.speaker: Tyler Cowen
insights.so_what: A concrete consumer use case for premium LLM subscriptions in travel/curation — a small signal on where everyday AI value is landing.
insights.quote: After two visits in three days, I would second the advice I got from this chat.
